detail_desc: Goethe exudes an aura of verbosity.
long_desc: Goethe is here, staring blindly into space.

detail_desc:
Harry is a tall man with a shaven head and a long pony tail...  Gee I wonder
if he is a Hare Krishna.
long_desc: Harry the Hare Krishna is busy burning incense and singing.

detail_desc:
Wally is an old, long haired man with an obvious affection to strange and
unusual magic items.  When he looks at you, he doesn't seem to be completely
there.
long_desc: Wally the Wizard is busy playing with his magical items.

detail_desc:
Specifically recruited by the upper class people of New Sparta, there is no
one more respectable and honest than the on-duty policeman.
long_desc: A policeman is here, walking his beat.

detail_desc:
You can see that this guy does not concentrate very much on his job and
tends to look the other way.  He seems to be more interested in filling his
belly with doughnuts than in protecting the city.
long_desc: A cop is wandering around looking for doughnuts.

detail_desc:
Driven to desperate measures, this leech of society is after one thing...
Your money.  He'll do anything to get it too.
long_desc: A mugger is thinking about taking your money or your life.

detail_desc:
Every metropolis has them, well so does New Sparta.  Be careful not to get
caught in their line of sight.
long_desc: A tourist is here, taking in the sights.

detail_desc:
You see Norm from Cheers, he is big, fat, drinks a lot and is an overall
jolly fellow.
long_desc: Norm is drinking another beer.

detail_desc:
A postal worker who never seems to be doing his job, Cliff is out of touch
with reality and tends to be annoying--even to his friends.
long_desc: Cliff is rattling off useless trivia.

detail_desc: Carla splashes a drink in your face.
long_desc: Carla is waiting on tables.

detail_desc:
A farm boy from Indiana, he has not quite fit into the atmosphere of the big
city yet.
long_desc: Woody is waiting to serve you a drink.

detail_desc:
This high official, like most other politicians, seems uninterested in
helping the community.  Not a man to be trifled with, the Mayor is reputed to
have ties with the mob kingpin -- Lucifer.
long_desc: Mayor Abe is about, inspecting the city.

detail_desc:
A very harried but yet beautiful woman.  Most of her anguish stems from her
sexual frustrations and from attempting to keep Cheers in order.
long_desc: Rebecca Howe is hurrying about making sure Cheers is in order.

detail_desc:
A very handsome, self-assured ex-baseball player who is very popular with
the ladies, but often finds himself in sticky situations.
long_desc: Sam is here, hitting on the women.

detail_desc:
Though very emotionally unstable for a psychiatrist, Dr.  Crane tries to aid
people with their problems while creating his own.
long_desc: Frasier is here psychoanalyzing patrons in the bar.

detail_desc:
A calm, thoroughly rational and logical thinker on the outside -- a wild,
crazy, sexual goddess on the inside.
long_desc: Lilith is sitting at the bar, keeping a watchful eye on Frasier.

detail_desc:
Paul is a robust man, who tends to be a bit childish when around Norm and
Cliff.
long_desc: Paul is here, drinking a beer.

detail_desc:
This is an everyday unwanted alley cat who spends most of his day looking
for food.
long_desc: An alley cat is looking for food.

detail_desc: Pee Wee is the owner of this peep show, so you'd better not piss him off.
long_desc: Pee Wee is doing something you would rather not like to know.

detail_desc:
You see a punk who is more than willing to knock off an old lady for a few
bucks.
long_desc: A punk is here, deciding what color to spray paint your back.

detail_desc: Skinheads are mean and nasty...  Better not stare too long.
long_desc: A skinhead is here, looking for a punk to kill.

detail_desc: When you look at her she says, 'Hey baby, wanna party?  '
long_desc: A prostitute is soliciting you.

detail_desc: This is the evil bald-headed guy who runs Melville's.
long_desc: Jonathan Hill is here, welcoming his costumers.

detail_desc: Da Da Deah (sorry for the bad sound effects)!  It's the Bishop!
long_desc: The Bishop is here, looking for a crime to solve.

detail_desc:
Dockworkers get very strong from lifting crates and the size of his muscles
make you think twice about attacking him.
long_desc: A dockworker is busy moving crates.

detail_desc:
When you take a closer look, you realize that this is not the lovely lady
you first laid eyes on, but is really just a female impersonator.
long_desc: A prostitute is here, looking for customers.

detail_desc:
You over hear the pimp reciting poetry...
        Bitch better have my money
        not some, not half
        but all my cash!
long_desc: A pimp is busy counting his money to see if his women have been cheating him.

detail_desc:
This is one of Orcland's lineman.  He is a balanced player, but has no
outstanding abilities.
long_desc: A Raiders' lineman is here hunting for the ball.

detail_desc:
This is one of New Sparta's lineman.  He is a balanced player, but has no
outstanding abilities.
long_desc: A Warriors' lineman is here hunting for the ball.

detail_desc:
This is one of the Orcs' skilled receivers.  He is quick, but not very
powerful.
long_desc: A Raiders' receiver is here running a pattern.

detail_desc:
This is one of the Warriors' skilled receiver.  He is quick, but not very
powerful.
long_desc: A Warriors' receiver is here running a pattern.

detail_desc:
This is the slowest (both physically AND mentally) of the bloodbowl players.
However, he is also very large and powerful, so be careful when tangling with
him.
long_desc: A Raiders' blocker is trying to pave an open pathway.

detail_desc:
This is the slowest (both physically AND mentally) of the bloodbowl players.
However, he is also very large and powerful, so be careful when tangling with
him.
long_desc: A Warriors' blocker is trying to pave an open pathway.

detail_desc:
Similar to a quarterback, this is a player with both mobility and a cannon
for an arm.  He can also hold his own when hitting with the big boys.
long_desc: A Raiders' thrower, attempting a pass.

detail_desc:
Similar to a quarterback, this is a player with both mobility and a cannon
for an arm.  He can also hold his own when hitting with the big boys.
long_desc: A Warriors' thrower, attempting a pass.

detail_desc:
An all-around fearsome athlete, the blitzer is the toughest most aggressive
player on the bloodbowl field.
long_desc: A fierce Raiders' blitzer, waiting to tear someone limb from limb.

detail_desc:
An all-around fearsome athlete, the blitzer is the toughest most aggressive
player on the bloodbowl field.
long_desc: A fierce Warriors' blitzer, waiting to tear someone limb from limb.

detail_desc: Your average sports fan, who attends a game now and then.
long_desc: A loyal fan is here enjoying the game.

detail_desc: Awww, how cute!!!
long_desc: A child is here, wandering around.

detail_desc: A merchant with a variety of goods, with nothing you particularly need.
long_desc: A vendor is here peddling his goods.

detail_desc: A strong, dirty, harsh-talking construction worker.
long_desc: A construction worker is here on his break.

detail_desc: Sit down, sit down, sit down, sit down -- sit down you're rocking the boat.
long_desc: A drunk, rowdy fan is here, making an ass of himself.

detail_desc: Not as efficient as a police officer, but then not as expensive either.
long_desc: A Security Guard is here, attempting to maintain order.

detail_desc:
This is one poor excuse for a Fire Marshall.  He's obviously started more
fires in his day than he's actually extinguished.  Just another sad example of
nepotism in today's world!
long_desc: Fire Marshall Bob is busy trying to extinguish the fire that is on his back.

detail_desc:
Well, the less skilled relatives of the Sparta executives needed a job
somewhere, so they wound up here.  Obviously, it is a very cushy job because
there are no real fires in New Sparta.
long_desc: A fireman is here, looking rather useless.

detail_desc:
The only good attribute of this beast is her low prices, which would explain
why she is always busy with punks and skinheads.
long_desc: A whore is looking for customers.

detail_desc:
This is one of the weakest of the evil inhabitants of the library.  They
will do anything for a good grade or to keep a good man down.
long_desc: A minor throat is busy doing homework.

detail_desc:
This is one of the most populated species of the library.  They are really
desperate for a good grade.
long_desc: A throat is here, looking for someone's notes to steal.

detail_desc:
You see a barely human creature that has absolutely no morals or sense of
dignity.
long_desc: A major throat is busy hiding all the science reference books.

detail_desc:
You see a devilish looking creature that would gladly sell its sister into
slavery for a good grade.
long_desc: A senior throat is burning all the useful books.

detail_desc:
The master throat is the devilish and desperate creature that lacks any
morals or self dignity.  Watch out, its' eyeing your stuff right now!
long_desc: The master throat is here, trying to break into the school records.

detail_desc:
Wow!  Don't you wish there were more girls like these around?  Almost
nothing rivals the beauty of the cheerleaders, unfortunately their looks are
not always matched by their brains (unfortunately for them, but lucky for YOU!!
), though you are positive you could forget about that fact for just a few
hours.
long_desc: A cheerleader is here rooting on the home team.

detail_desc:
You gaze at this beauty with long, flowing blonde hair, an angelic, calming
face, firm, ample...  And a body that just screams...!  You snap out of your
daydream and notice that she is frowning at you, as she does not appreciate
people undressing her with their eyes.
long_desc: Ilsa the Head Cheerleader is here, looking totally gorgeous!

detail_desc:
The Chief is a longtime law enforcement agent who has become overweight from
years of eating doughnuts.  He is a jolly Irishman, who for the first time will
have to do his job without the services of Batman.  Unfortunately for you, he
actually looks up to the job now!  Looks like he has finally gotten a clue.
long_desc: Chief O'Hara is sitting behind his desk.

detail_desc: A staunch proponent of the death penalty, and the keeper of the jail key.
long_desc: The Warden is here guarding the jail.

detail_desc:
The maid is a lady weary from constant upkeep of the hotel who views most of
mankind as slobs.
long_desc: A maid is here cleaning up after the guests.

detail_desc:
The law finally caught up to this character killer, who is serving an
indefinite sentence.  May this be a lesson to you all.
long_desc: Esprit is behind bars, where he belongs.

detail_desc:
You see a student working at her part-time job.  She really would rather be
somewhere else, but needs the money for tuition.
long_desc: A cashier is busy filing her nails.

detail_desc:
You can see that this guy does not concentrate very much on his job and
tends to look the other way.  He seems to be more interested in filling his
belly with doughnuts than in protecting the city.
long_desc: The cop is sitting here eating doughnuts.

detail_desc:
You can see that this guy does not concentrate very much on his job and
tends to look the other way.  He seems to be more interested in filling his
belly with beer than in protecting the city.
long_desc: The cop is sitting here having a drink.

detail_desc:
From the size of her pockets, you can see that this is one busy
kleptomaniac.
long_desc: A shoplifter is busy stuffing things into her pockets.

detail_desc:
This guy's been around fish so long that he is beginning to look and smell
like one.
long_desc: A fisherman is waiting to serve you.

detail_desc: Like most arms dealers, he has got greased back hair and a slimy moustache.
long_desc: An arms dealer is cleaning his guns.

detail_desc:
Like most 7-11 managers, Raghuram is Indian, and speaks with a near
incomprehensible accent.
long_desc: Raghuram the 7-11 Manager is here.

detail_desc:
You see a tall humanoid duck who is quite confused and very dim-witted, but
definitely no duck to mess with.  You instinctively retch in reaction to
looking at this horrible thing!
long_desc: Launchpad McQuack is here following Darkwing.

detail_desc:
You can almost feel the intelligence and wisdom points being reduced as you
feel the blood rush from your head to another part of your anatomy.
long_desc: A bleached blonde bimbo is bouncing around.

detail_desc:
Wow, you have never seen such large breasts before in your life, it really
makes you believe that there is a God!  (and he likes big butts too)
long_desc: A stripper is here, undressing for your entertainment.

detail_desc:
He is an experienced mage who has specialized in the field of Combat Magic.
He is here to guard the Mage's Guild and his superior knowledge of offensive as
well as defensive spells make him a deadly opponent.
long_desc: A sorcerer is guarding the entrance.

detail_desc:
He is a specially trained warrior belonging to the military order of the
Faith.  His duty is to protect the faithful from persecution and infidel
attacks and his religious devotion combined with his superior skill makes him a
deadly opponent.
long_desc: A knight templar is guarding the entrance.

detail_desc:
He is a thief who has specialized in killing others as effectively as
possible, using all sorts of weapons.  His superior knowledge of how and where
to use them combined with his extraordinary stealth makes him a deadly
opponent.
long_desc: An assassin is guarding the entrance.

detail_desc:
He is an expert warrior who has attained knighthood through countless
chivalrous deeds.  His duty is to protect the Guild of Swordsmen and his
extreme skill combined with his experience in warfare makes him a deadly
opponent.
long_desc: A knight is guarding the entrance.

detail_desc:
Even though your Guildmaster looks old and tired, you can clearly see the
vast amount of knowledge she possesses.  She is wearing fine magic clothing,
and you notice that she is surrounded by a blue shimmering aura.
long_desc: The Mages' Guildmaster is standing here.

detail_desc:
You are in no doubt that this Guildmaster is truly close to your god; he has
a peaceful, loving look.  You notice that he is surrounded by a white aura.
long_desc: The Clerics' Guildmaster is standing here.

detail_desc:
You realize that whenever your Guildmaster moves, you fail to notice it -
the way of the true thief.  She is to be dressed in poor clothing, having the
appearance of a beggar.
long_desc: The Thieves' Guildmaster is standing here.

detail_desc:
This is your master.  Big and strong with bulging muscles.  Several scars
across his body proves that he was using arms before you were born.  He has a
calm look on his face.
long_desc: The Warriors' Guildmaster is standing here.

detail_desc: This Captain has eaten more sharks than you have killed peas.
long_desc: A retired Captain stands here, selling boats.

detail_desc:
An old but very strong armorer.  He has made more armor in his life than
you have ever seen.
long_desc: An Armorer stands here displaying his shiny new (and previously owned) armor.

detail_desc:
You notice a tired look in her face.  She looks like she isn't paid well
enough to put up with any crap from mud players with attitudes.
long_desc: A receptionist stands in front of you, looking quite bored.

detail_desc: A tired looking waiter.
long_desc: A waiter is going around from one place to another.

detail_desc:
This man was a famous sorcerer in his young days but now leads a quiet,
peaceful life as a waiter.
long_desc: A waiter is going around from one place to another.

detail_desc: This waiter seems to have reach contact with God.
long_desc: A waiter is going around from one place to another.

detail_desc: This waiter knows where all his customers has their money.
long_desc: A waiter is going around from one place to another.

detail_desc:
The waiter looks like he could easily kill you while still carrying quite a
few firebreathers.
long_desc: A waiter is going around from one place to another.

detail_desc: What is there to say?  He is cleaning stuff up.  Wow.  What a thrill.
long_desc: A janitor is walking around, cleaning up.

detail_desc:
A fido is a small dog that has a foul smell and pieces of rotted meat
hanging around its teeth.
long_desc: A beastly fido is here.

detail_desc: A drunk who seems to be too happy, and to carry too much money.
long_desc: A singing, happy drunk.

detail_desc: The kitten looks like a cute, little, fierce fighter.
long_desc: A small loyal kitten is here.

detail_desc: The puppy looks like a cute, little, fierce fighter.
long_desc: A small loyal puppy is here.

detail_desc: The beagle looks like a fierce fighter.
long_desc: A small, quick, loyal beagle is here.

detail_desc: The rottweiler looks like a strong, fierce fighter.
long_desc: A large, loyal rottweiler is here.

detail_desc: The wolf looks like a strong, fearless fighter.
long_desc: A large, trained wolf is here.
